commit.message:
Add verified prediction market trading platform

Four AI agents scan prediction markets, commit predictions on-chain
via Chainlink CRE, and get scored by an independent oracle via
Chainlink Functions. Contracts deployed on Ethereum Sepolia and
verified on Tenderly Virtual TestNet.

- SignalRegistry + AccuracyLedger with real Chainlink DON scoring
- SeptonsVault with Chainlink ETH/USD Price Feed
- Market Scout, Autonomous Trader, Portfolio Manager, Intelligence Advisor
- Next.js dashboard with RainbowKit wallet connect
- CRE signal recorder workflow
- Deploy scripts for Sepolia and Tenderly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Date Night hours check to use admin-updated day columns

The isOpenDuringSlot function was reading from the standalone `hours`
JSONB column (stale from onboarding) instead of the individual day
columns (sun_open, sun_close, etc.) that the admin page actually writes
to. This caused businesses with updated hours to still be filtered out.

Priority order is now: individual day columns → config.hours → hours JSONB.

commit.message:
feat: auto-invalidate query cache when SQL changes

Add SQL hash to disk cache key so modified queries automatically
cache-miss and re-fetch, while unchanged queries stay cached.
No more manual DB_CACHE_VERSION bumps for query changes.

Applied to getBowlerSeasonStats (turkeys column). Other queries
can be migrated incrementally.

commit.message:
Fix truncated salt: remove eager partial buffer matching

Serial data arrives in fragments. The partial buffer check matched
CHIPID:...:SALT:3910318 before the rest of the salt (648) arrived,
causing HMAC to be computed on truncated data. Now only process
complete newline-terminated lines.

commit.message:
feat(studios): Download Set Deck + Set Layout on all set landing pages

Feature 1 — Download Set Deck button (FEATURE 1)
  • New DownloadSetDeckButton component added to StudioHero CTA row
  • Two modes:
    - studio.setPdfUrl set (CMS upload) → instant <a download> from Sanity CDN
    - No PDF uploaded → generates branded A4 PDF client-side via @react-pdf/renderer
      on first click (dynamically imported; 0 bytes added to initial bundle)
  • SetDeckPDF document: dark/gold branded design, A4 landscape-portrait,
    includes set name, tagline, size/height/capacity stats strip, full description,
    facilities checklist, numbered suitable-for list, rate badge, booking footer
  • Button shows Generating… spinner during PDF build, error state on failure
  • Installed: @react-pdf/renderer

Feature 2 — Set Layout section (FEATURE 2)
  • New SetLayout component inserted between StudioGallery and StudioDetails
  • Shows floor plan image when setLayoutImage is present in data/CMS
  • When no image: renders an illustrated placeholder diagram with zone markers
    and the studio icon — always looks intentional, never broken
  • Sidebar quick-reference card (area, height, capacity, rate)
  • CTA row: WhatsApp walkthrough + Book This Set →
  • Fully responsive: collapses to single-column below 900px

Sanity CMS schema (studio.ts):
  • setPDF       — file upload (PDF), linked to Download Set Deck button
  • setLayoutImage — image field for floor plan / layout diagram
  • setLayoutDescription — text field for zone / camera angle notes

Data types (sets.ts StudioSet interface):
  • setPdfUrl?, setLayoutImage?, setLayoutDescription? — all optional

All 9 set landing pages updated automatically (dynamic route).
Build: 21 static pages generated, 0 TypeScript errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch to MLA whitelist mode: only quantize q_b_proj/wq_b layers

omni-infer only supports INT8 dequantization on specific MLA A8W8 weight
matrices. The previous blacklist mode quantized too many layers, causing
runtime errors. Now only q_b_proj and wq_b are quantized; all other Linear
layers are dynamically collected into the ignore list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: multi_speak subtitle sync — use text-based timing, remove pre-warm

Audio buffer duration includes trailing silence, causing subtitles to
scroll too slowly and lag behind speech. Switched to text-based estimate
(18 chars/sec) which matches actual speaking speed. Removed pre-warm
player approach which added complexity without fixing the real issue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add gamification system and design polish (#7)

Features:
- Hot streak counter (🔥 N in header, banner at 3/5/10 in a row)
- Session XP: +10/correct, +15 on streak ≥3, float-up animation
- XP/levels system with progress bar on home screen
- Daily streak tracking (persists across sessions)
- Daily Challenge mode (10-card date-seeded deck)
- Confetti on session completion (intensity scales with score)
- Performance-based done screen messages (4 tiers)
- Badges: First Blood, Hot Streak, On Fire, Flawless, Daily Challenger
- Mastery Moment animation when word transitions to mastered
- Card feedback: green glow on correct, red shake on miss (fix: box-shadow
  on card face instead of transform on card-inner, preventing flip glitch)

Design:
- Add Nunito font for a friendly, rounded feel
- Unified stats card (streak + XP in one panel with divider)
- More generous spacing throughout home screens
- Featured Daily Challenge button with blue/purple gradient
- Taller subject cards with larger icons
- Bolder stat numbers and section labels
- Buttons now inherit font-family

Co-authored-by: Joshua Newland <newlandj@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: real x402 payments + ShieldVault attestations + CRE workflow fix

Backend (api.ts):
- Add @x402/axios, @x402/evm, viem for real USDC payments on Base Sepolia
- Conditional REAL vs MOCK payment path in POST /api/buy
- Step 1: Preflight checks USDC balance via viem readContract
- Step 2+3: x402/axios auto-handles 402→sign→pay→retry with MCP server
- Step 5: Write attestation to ShieldVault.sol via writeContract
- Fallback to data tx if ShieldVault not deployed
- Health endpoint now shows shieldVault address and agent wallet

CRE Workflow (main.ts):
- Fix all TypeScript errors against real @chainlink/cre-sdk API
- HTTPCapability.trigger() instead of cre.triggers.HTTPTrigger()
- HTTPClient.sendRequest() instead of .fetch()
- Correct Runtime/NodeRuntime types, report/writeReport signatures
- body as string (RequestJson), gasLimit as string
- Compiles clean with zero errors

README.md:
- Add live demo URLs (Vercel frontend, EC2 backend, BaseScan)
- Expanded Chainlink file links table (required by submission)
- CRE Capabilities Used table with line references
- Updated architecture diagram with full flow
- Quick start with deploy + simulate instructions

feat(notas-fiscais): distribuição quebrada por almoxarifado por item

Permite distribuir a quantidade de cada item da NF-e entre múltiplos
almoxarifados. Ex: 2 caixas d'água → 1 para Almox A + 1 para Almox B.

- Novo tipo DistributionSplit { almoxarifadoId, quantidade }

  automático para evitar sobre-alocação
- UI Apple-quality: barra de alocação animada, badge de split, stepper
  −/+ por quantidade, botão "+ Adicionar destino" com saldo restante
- handleImport faz flatMap dos splits em movimentações individuais
- Validação: quantidade nunca excede o total (clamp em updateSplitQty)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: storyboard coherence should not crash pipeline in hackathon mode

The coherence node was re-raising exceptions in hackathon mode, killing
the entire story pipeline even though all images were already generated.
Root cause: Gemini returning empty response for multimodal coherence
check (likely safety filter on generated images), causing JSONDecodeError.
Coherence is additive — never worth discarding completed work over.

commit.message:
Harden security and robustness across all layers

Backend (server.py):
- Restrict CORS to localhost + GitHub Pages origin (was wildcard *)
- Add ID validation in reorder endpoint (skip unsafe IDs)
- Fix pairing rate limiter: proper datetime comparison (was string)
- Use timing-safe secrets.compare_digest for pairing code validation
- Store pairing expiry as datetime objects (not ISO strings)
- Add global error handler returning JSON 500 on unhandled exceptions

Frontend (both HTML files):
- Eliminate innerHTML XSS: use textContent/DOM methods for error messages
- Add isSafeId filtering in applyReorder before sending to API
- Harden idbPutAll: validate array input, skip clear on empty data
- Validate QR code origin before pairing (reject foreign domains)
- Fix undo-delete: preserve original ID/timestamps to prevent sync dupes

Desktop (launcher.py, popup.py):
- Add atexit mutex cleanup (ReleaseMutex + CloseHandle) on exit
- Track and cancel auto-hide timer to prevent stale callbacks on re-show

commit.message:
fix(products): fix category mapping breaking all non-metabolic filters

mapCategoryToProductCategory normalized spaces to dashes but the map
keys still used spaces, so "Build & Strengthen" became "build-&-strengthen"
which didn't match "build & strengthen". All non-metabolic categories
silently fell through to the default "metabolic" — meaning clicking
Recovery, Cognitive, Growth Hormone, or Blends showed zero results.

Added both spaced and dashed forms plus goal-based display names to the
mapping, and fixed the lookup to try both forms.

Inject strong language switch signal when spoken language changes mid-call

When STT detects the user switched languages (e.g. English to Hindi), inject a
[SYSTEM: ...] hint telling Claude to respond entirely in the new language with
native grammar. Previously, only the subtle [spoken_language:xx] tag was sent,
which Haiku often ignored when the conversation history was full of English.
